## Checklist

- [ ] I added one submission JSON file under `submissions/`.
- [ ] The generated game is playable by an evaluator.
- [ ] `play_url` points to a playable game or best available launch target.
- [ ] `source_url` points to the source artifact if available.
- [ ] I included one-command local run instructions in `description` if the game is not hosted.
- [ ] I ran `uv run brain-training validate-submissions`.

## Notes for Evaluators

Add anything useful for playing or evaluating the game.
